_comment: v14-Branch B: Make ChromaDB vocab embeddings learnable nn.Parameter. Hypothesis: v13 plateaued (final loss 5.04, ~4.45 nats above 0.59 floor at INV_TEMP=30) and produced word-salad output despite a confident brain. Brain learns to predict in directions of frozen sentence-transformer geometry, which optimizes for semantic similarity not syntactic prediction. Letting vocab move under xent gradient tests whether vocab geometry is the residual bottleneck. Single-variable change: vocab_matrix_global -> nn.Parameter, added to AdamW with lr=EMBED_LR/2=2.5e-4. Brain weights warm-started from v13 final and frozen for epoch 0 (so vocab adjusts against fixed predictions) then unfrozen for epoch 1+. Architecture, corpus, INV_TEMPERATURE all frozen at v13 values.
